title: The Pondicherry (Alteration of Name) Act, 2006
full_text: The Pondicherry (Alteration of Name) Act, 2006 पांडिचेरी (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200644 Act Number: 44 Enactment Date: 2006-09-13 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Pondicherry (Alteration of Name) Act, 2006 Hindi Title: पांडिचेरी (नाम-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to alter the name of the Union territory of Pondicherry Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-10-2006 Notification: 1st October, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 1627(E), dated, 28th September, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
